name: Ted Budd
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $689,546 for Ted Budd in U.S. Senate, NC. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
